card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Coordinate mobile safe-area and browser layout behavior through one viewport, text-alignment, and input-coordinate contract instead of screenshot-specific offsets.
card.objective: Keep menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry visually balanced and make the rendered touch target agree with the user's physical touch across visual-viewport origin changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared UI text uses consistent optical centering and symmetric padding without bottom-biased empty space.
Options and Pause share one full-safe-height shell with fixed header and action lanes around a flexible scroll viewport.
Phone-sized menu, Options, play, and Pause surfaces pass route-aware bounds, overlap, scroll, and console proof.
Physical iPhone and installed-PWA evidence remains required before terminal completion.
discoveries: PR #79 removes the hidden play-HUD offset and centered height cap that made Pause shorter than the safe viewport.
Live 390x844 production proof measured 8px outer gutters and a 626px Pause scroll lane with every guide, label, and action contained.
nextActions: Collect operator physical-iPhone screenshots for the full-height Pause and Options shell, text padding, safe areas, and scroll behavior.
Collect physical touch-alignment and controller-feel proof across mobile browser-chrome changes.
Retain installed-PWA and native browser-chrome/maximize acceptance work.
blockers: Physical-device post-deploy screenshots and touch proof remain operator-held.
evidence: Vercel production deployment dpl_2LQxaMdD7Q41XGyr1Z3iQ6K2zmz8 is Ready and aliased to https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
Focused UI proof passed 63/63 tests; architecture proof passed 18/18 tests; build and diff checks passed.
Production 390x844 proof measured an 8/8/374/828 shell, a 24/84/342/626 Pause viewport, contained guide, labels, and actions, 12px guide-title scroll persistence, and zero browser warnings or errors.

entry.headline: Full-height mobile overlay shell is merged and live for physical-iPhone review
completed: Merged PR #79 to Mazer main as 9600cfb42ffce53578d357cdf610e6c8c950d080.
Deployed the exact merge commit to Vercel production as dpl_2LQxaMdD7Q41XGyr1Z3iQ6K2zmz8.

Verified the canonical production alias at 390x844 with 8px shell gutters, a 626px Pause scroll lane, contained content and actions, preserved partially visible guide text, and zero browser warnings or errors.
discovered: The production surface now uses one full-safe-height layout contract for Options and Pause instead of retaining space for hidden play HUD.
next: Use operator iPhone screenshots to complete physical safe-area, overlay-height, text-padding, scroll, and touch review without ratcheting from emulation alone.
